name: property managers processing 10–20 utility bills/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual categorization causes delays in financial reporting. We automate the extraction and categorization of utility bills instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Manual categorization of utility bills is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual categorization of utility bills is time-consuming and error-prone.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual categorization causes delays in financial reporting. We automate the extraction and categorization of utility bills instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking and categorization of bills using spreadsheets

one_liner: For property managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual categorization causes delays in financial reporting. We automate the extraction and categorization of utility bills instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
